Video.summary: These are the films that made Bruce Lee the greatest martial artist in Hollywood history.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Director Ti West hosts a thrilling lineup of genre-bending horror, action-packed adventures, mysteries, and more!
Video.grandparentTitle: Chills and Thrills with Ti West
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: TFH celebrates Alfred Hitchcock and the masterful storytelling that still keeps audiences on the edge of their seats.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These women play for keeps in the darkest alleys of noir cinema.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From smoldering glances to deadly betrayals, these thrillers show just how far desire can push the human heart.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: When horror wears an alluring face, loyalties blur and desire becomes the deadliest curse of all.
Video.grandparentTitle: Fatale Femmes Vol. 3: Daughters of Darkness
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Giant monsters are on the rampage! Who will save us?
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Take a look back at the epic adventures, timeless dramas, and groundbreaking sci-fi classics that defined Charlton Heston's career.
Video.grandparentTitle: Charlton Heston: Man of Monumental Movies
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Stay off the streets when these Hollywood stars get behind the wheel.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Bold and seductive. Provocative and iconic. These boundary-pushing movies live on the edge.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This is Sidney Poitier at his best: bold roles, powerful stories, and a legacy that transformed American cinema.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A master of comic timing and transformation, this is Peter Sellers at his most brilliant and unpredictable.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Many Faces of Peter Sellers
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jack Nicholson's career is defined by charismatic charm, brilliant madness, and iconic performances across decades.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From "The Big Sleep" to "Casablanca" and beyond, this is the best of Humphrey Bogart.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From "Bonnie and Clyde" to "The Royal Tenenbaums," these are the movies that made Gene Hackman a Hollywood legend.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From 'Haunted Hill' to Corman classics, Vincent Price sent shivers down the spines of horror fans for decades.
Video.grandparentTitle: Vincent Price: Master of the Silver Scream
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Science fiction dominated cinema screens in the 1980s, and these are the ones we'll always remember.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Aliens and Androids have taken a “Fantastic Voyage” to Earth, and now we are all in “Altered States!”
Video.title: Aliens, Androids & Alternate Futures Vol. 1

Video.summary: “Invaders from Mars” have landed, hired ‘Robocop,” and are all now driving cross-country with “Speed Racer”
Video.title: Aliens, Androids & Alternate Futures Vol. 2

Video.summary: Like your Film Noir with a dash of “Body Heat,” while having dinner in “Chinatown?” Tune in!
Video.title: Neo-Noir Necessities

Video.summary: Your favorite filmmakers pull their favorite noir films out of the shadows.
Video.title: Film Noir: The Dark Corner of Cinema

Image.alt: Film Noir: The Dark Corner of Cinema
Film Noir: The Dark Corner of Cinema
Film Noir: The Dark Corner of Cinema

Video.summary: A disgraced museum employee schemes to take advantage of a trusting invalid.
Video.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents: The Cheney Vase

Image.alt: Alfred Hitchcock Presents: The Cheney Vase
Alfred Hitchcock Presents: The Cheney Vase
Alfred Hitchcock Presents: The Cheney Vase

Video.summary: A seasoned magician takes a simple-minded runaway under his wing, unaware that his wife harbors a sinister plan for the impressionable young man.
Video.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents: The Sorcerer's Apprentice

Image.alt: Alfred Hitchcock Presents: The Sorcerer's Apprentice
Alfred Hitchcock Presents: The Sorcerer's Apprentice
Alfred Hitchcock Presents: The Sorcerer's Apprentice

Video.summary: Frank Sinatra is no angel in this seedy tale of assassins plotting to kill the president during his visit to the small California town of Suddenly.
Video.title: Suddenly

Video.summary: In this noir classic, Edmond O’Brien stars as Frank Bigelow, an accountant who unknowingly swallows deadly toxin and is given days to live. Determined to find out who did it, and why, Frank begins to put the pieces together. But will he find his killer before it’s too late?
Video.title: D.O.A.

Video.summary: A distraught young woman witnesses a murder and is committed to a sanitarium by the very man who did it.
Video.title: Shock

Video.summary: A down-on-his-luck Humphrey Bogart teams with a group of crooks chasing their fortune in British East Africa.
Video.title: Beat the Devil

Video.summary: TFH creator Joe Dante celebrates the noir classics that explore themes of identity, paranoia, and duality.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These mystery movies have gripped audiences for decades. What's their secret?
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A gripping collection of noir classics, where crime, corruption, and fate collide on the big screen.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hardboiled & Haunted: The Art of Noir Cinema
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These are the early hits that made Steven Spielberg the biggest name in blockbuster movies.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Humanity faces its greatest threat as the monstrous lizard Barugon is unleashed in Japan. It’s up to Gamera to find his way back to Earth and save the day.
Video.title: Episode 1
